reviews.text: We worked with Beau for both our engagement photos and wedding day pictures and couldn't have been happier with how well everything went and how fantastic the pictures are!  We've had people tell us our engagement photos belong in a magazine and that the love just leaps out of our wedding day pictures!  In addition to his amazing work Beau was always easy to work with, helping keep us on track, recommending locations, and capturing all the best candid moments.

We had Beau as our wedding photographer this August and he was amazing! From the time we booked him to the wedding day he made sure to check in with us multiple times over phone so we knew what to expect on the wedding day. Beau made sure to get all of our photo wants the day of and returned the most amazing album of photos for us. Highly recommend working with Blue Spruce!

Beau at Blue Spruce Photography was the best photographer we could have asked for at our recent wedding. Beau was our preferred photographer at Ken Caryl Vista and we quickly understood why. His attention to detail and ability to capture every shot you hoped to get is astounding. Beau was quick to respond and worked with us on our every request. He is also amazing at getting you photos back in a reasonable timeframe with giving you an early first look. We were very touched that he was willing to give us any and all shots he thought we would have a value in. Beau’s entire team is also wonderful to work with. We had Shane as our second photographer and Luke as our videographer. Not a moment was missed. Our guests have continued to comment on how impressed they were that they were everywhere and captured so much. If you are wanting to make sure your special day is captured in its entirety go with Blue Spruce Photography to not miss a moment to hold forever!

amazing photos that make me cry - in a happy way - when i look back at my wedding day! Booked a good time in advance and got the best photos and best vibes. Though some things were rocky, the photographers pulled through and delivered amazing photos!!

We booked Blue Spruce for wedding and engagement photos after meeting Beau at the RMBS. We just had our wedding this past July and are so happy with how everything turned out! Photography was one of our highest priorities for our wedding, and are SO glad we went with Blue Spruce!!

Beau is very responsive to emails and has lots of great ideas for photo locations, both for the engagement pics and near our wedding venue. He is clearly very familiar with the area (our wedding is in Golden). We appreciated that he was flexible with us on scheduling when our original date for engagement pics had bad weather in the forecast.

I really like his photojournalistic style and calm energy. He is able to lead groups of people for taking photos, but does not feel obtrusive in any way. Our whole wedding party was so impressed with him and had a lot of fun taking photos with him! We love how he managed to capture really great pictures of us, while also showing all of the detail of the scenery around us.

Aside from the amazing end result, we had complete trust in Beau throughout the process- trust that he would show up and follow through as promised, and trust that the photos would turn out amazing. This was truly invaluable.

We also did our wedding videography through Blue Spruce with Jordan. The video turned out amazing!

We truly could not be happier with every aspect of working with Beau and Blue Spruce photography!!
